log: === INITIATIVE ===
Young Red Dragon: 10 (d20:10 + 0)
Reborn — Bardic Musician: 8 (d20:6 + 2)
=== ROUND 1 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon descends and moves from (8,0) to (0,0) [40ft].
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Reborn — Bardic Musician HP: 51/67
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Reborn — Bardic Musician HP: 33/67
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS!
⚡ Reborn — Bardic Musician casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:16 total 26 vs AC 14 — still hits.
--- Reborn — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Reborn — Bardic Musician casts Hypnotic Pattern (3rd level)
→ AoE hits 1 target(s)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: FAIL
→ Young Red Dragon gains: charmed_hp, incapacitated
Reborn — Bardic Musician casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Reborn — Bardic Musician for 9. HP: 42/67
=== ROUND 2 ===
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Reborn — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Reborn — Bardic Musician casts Dissonant Whispers (1st level)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 11 damage.
→ Young Red Dragon takes damage — Hypnotic Pattern charm breaks!
→ Young Red Dragon gains: must_use_reaction_to_move_away
Reborn — Bardic Musician casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Reborn — Bardic Musician for 9. HP: 51/67
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 23 damage. Reborn — Bardic Musician HP: 28/67
→ Concentration save: [24 vs DC 11] MAINTAINED!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 21 damage. Reborn — Bardic Musician HP: 7/67
→ Reborn — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 8 damage. Reborn — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
